function.name: set_world_fact
function.description: Store or update a world fact using LWW CRDT semantics. Facts are content-addressed by domain|entity|attribute.

entity.description: The entity this fact is about (e.g. 'king', 'treaty-1').

value.description: The value of the attribute (bool, str, float, or null).

version.description: CRDT version vector. Higher version wins on conflict.

agent_id.description: The ID of the agent asserting this fact.

db.description: Path to the agentcrdt SQLite database.

function.name: get_world_facts
function.description: List world facts from the agentcrdt store, optionally filtered by domain.

db.description: Path to the agentcrdt SQLite database.

function.name: merge_world_state
function.description: Merge a remote agentcrdt store into the local one using LWW CRDT semantics. Returns merged fact count and any contradiction events.

db.description: Path to the local agentcrdt SQLite database.

other_db.description: Path to the remote agentcrdt SQLite database to merge from.
